scope: drift/saturation/alarm cohort frontmatter and lint-readiness audit
learner_facing_quality_improvement: This wave isolates the learner-facing drift and saturation path that is still missing v3 metadata, while proving the current migration stall comes from the H1-first authoring gate rather than from bad non-Pilot document selection.

verification.lint_probe_result: all four frontmatter-present non-Pilot cohort docs fail with `first non-empty line must be an H1 (`# ...`)`, while the three frontmatter-missing priority targets currently pass the H1 gate

priority_non_pilot_targets.target_query_shape: load average 높다, cpu saturation 뭐가 달라요, runnable queue 왜 쌓여요
priority_non_pilot_targets.why_now: It matches direct learner symptom phrasing in an underrepresented operating-system path, so adding v3 metadata would improve first-hit routing once the lint gate is fixed.

priority_non_pilot_targets.target_query_shape: anti corruption mapping drift 뭐예요, external contract drift 왜 생겨요
priority_non_pilot_targets.why_now: It already contains strong retrieval anchors and cross-links, making it the lowest-risk software-engineering drift target after the authoring gate is repaired.

priority_non_pilot_targets.target_query_shape: spring scheduled cron drift, 멀티 인스턴스 스케줄러 중복 실행, leader election 언제 써요
priority_non_pilot_targets.why_now: It is the clearest spring bridge from scheduler symptoms into distributed coordination, which helps a spring intermediate-gap category without touching Pilot-locked content.

guardrails: No Pilot-locked corpus file was modified.
